steps.t: Aeglas is in his cell in the Goblin-town prison. Oghûk told you that the goblin-torturer Matuga has the key to his cell secured on a loop on his belt.…
Matuga is on the way to the Great Goblin's throne-room at the centre of Goblin-town. Aeglas distrusts the goblin Oghûk's intentions, but he does not d…
